permits.description: This Job will entail the gutting of interior down to studs and Joists, and new layout to be built according to drawings.  2 new Bathrooms and a NewKitchen to be Installed so new plumbing Wiring (NewService )New Minisplits  to be Installed. Framing new walls, installing LVLS,  new stair layout. All new insulation throughout, newly plastered, new floors  painting ETC
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($628,000); keyword: gut; minor: insulation
